verification_rule: Use redeem_test only after an actual in-game redemption. Use source_snapshot when current public sources agree on active or expired state. Prefer official Roblox/Discord/Trello evidence when accessible; otherwise require at least two credible current sources or one current source explicitly citing official Discord.

sources.name: Official Roblox game page
sources.notes: Accessible public HTML identifies [3x Luck] Sailor Piece by Shadowrise Devs, max level 20000, and says the community server carries exclusive reward codes. It does not expose current code strings in accessible HTML.

sources.name: Official Discord invite
sources.notes: Public invite/search result identifies the Official Discord Server of Shadowrise Devs' Sailor Piece. Channel messages such as code-list are not exposed in public HTML, so it is not direct code evidence today.

sources.name: GamesRadar Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Search/open result shows a June 9, 2026 update and lists 13 active codes: the three June 9 additions, existing 12,500-level reward-family codes, MASTERY, GHOULUPDATE, and RAIDS. It lists SORRYFORRESTARTGUYSTPBUG expired, creating an active-state conflict.

sources.name: Beebom Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Updated June 9, 2026. Lists the three new codes with exact reward bundles and keeps SORRYFORRESTARTGUYSTPBUG active. It places RAIDS in expired, creating an active-state conflict.

sources.name: Destructoid Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Search result published yesterday lists 14 active codes, including the three June 9 additions, RAIDS, and SORRYFORRESTARTGUYSTPBUG. Rewards are generic for some rows, so it is active-state support rather than exact reward proof for every code.

sources.name: Pro Game Guides Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Updated June 9, 2026. Lists 13 active codes including the three new codes and RAIDS; lists SORRYFORRESTARTGUYSTPBUG inactive. Useful as current support and conflict context.

sources.name: G2A Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: June 1 page lists the pre-June-9 active set and says the best place to get codes is the official Discord code-list channel. It is stale for the three June 9 additions but supports reward/level context for older rows.

sources.name: Pocket Tactics Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Updated June 8, 2026. Lists the pre-June-9 active set and exact rewards/level requirements for many retained codes. It is stale for the three June 9 additions.

sources.name: PCGamesN Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Updated June 4, 2026 and therefore stale for June 9 additions. Retained as conflict context only.

source_conflicts.conflict: Beebom and Destructoid list it active/current; GamesRadar and Pro Game Guides list it expired/inactive.
source_conflicts.next_step: Move to expired only if official Discord/Trello confirms expiry or stronger current sources join explicit expired evidence.

source_conflicts.conflict: GamesRadar, Destructoid, and Pro Game Guides list it active/current; Beebom lists it expired.
source_conflicts.next_step: Keep active until official evidence or stronger current-source expiry agreement appears.

source_conflicts.conflict: Older June 1-8 pages such as G2A, Pocket Tactics, and PCGamesN do not include the three June 9 additions because they are stale, not because they provide expiry evidence.
source_conflicts.next_step: Continue using June 9+ sources for these additions unless official evidence contradicts them.
